prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985 工程、211 工程、双一流建设高校；山东大学软科主榜排名约第 22 名（2021–2026 年稳定），威海校区共享校本部层次与声誉；2026 年声誉周期中山东大学评价为偏负面，主要涉及历史舆情事件（2019 年学伴事件），但抖音综合热度排名第 20（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；山东大学 A+ 学科数学，A 学科中国语言文学、外国语言文学、控制科学与工程、马克思主义理论，A- 学科法学、物理学、生物学、材料科学与工程等；威海校区开设的数学类、电子信息类、自动化类等专业与校本部优势学科高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信（ 高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、数学/统计（推荐）等专业社会热度持续升温；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 29.9 万，物理类估算约 20.9 万，较 2025 年（20.7 万）小幅增加，竞争略有加剧；山东大学（威海）位于山东省威海市，非本省院校；该校在贵州省招生占比约 1.5%（2025 年），属跨省招生，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024–2025 年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招 95% 及本省物理类考生小幅增加；考虑到该校 985 层次对考生的持续吸引力及电子信息类等热门专业的高报考热度，对扩招带来的位次后移效应做有限回调，预测最低位次约 10925 名，区间 10425–11425 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 6169→5424→5008→6639→7086, moving forward year by year from 2021 to 2023 (intensified competition), and significantly moving backward from 2024 to 2025 (weakened competition). The baseline for 2025 is about 7086th place, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2078 places over the past two years. The university's planned enrollment in Guizhou Province for science (physics category) was: 23 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 20 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 39 students, a substantial expansion of 95% compared to 2025, significantly easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Shandong University ranks approximately 22nd on the Soft Science main list (stable from 2021 to 2026). The Weihai campus shares the level and reputation of the main campus. In the 2026 reputation cycle, Shandong University's evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to historical public opinion incidents (the 2019 study partner incident), but its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable attention from applicants. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Shandong University has A+ disciplines in Mathematics, A disciplines in Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literature, Control Science and Engineering, and Marxist Theory, and A- disciplines in Law, Physics, Biology, Materials Science and Engineering, etc. The Weihai campus offers majors such as Mathematics, Electronic Information, and Automation, which are highly correlated with the main campus's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), and Mathematics/Statistics (recommended) continue to see rising social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in this province is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 209,000 in the physics category, a slight increase from 2025 (207,000), leading to slightly intensified competition. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, not a local institution. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 1.5% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025, the substantial 95% expansion in the 2026 plan, and the slight increase in physics category candidates in this province; taking into account the sustained attraction of the 985 level to applicants and the high application heat for popular majors like Electronic Information, a limited correction to the backward effect caused by expansion is made. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10925th, with a range of 10425 to 11425.

- Mathematics

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 10425–11425, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<10425), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Electronic Information and Mathematics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>11425), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement.
